stemHtml: Consider the following scenario, You are flying on a long range flight at your maximum 1.3g altitude and ATC asks you to start an immediate step climb. You are very close to your next waypoint, which requires a 90 degree heading change with a 45 degree angle of bank. How should you reply ATC?

options.b: Roger, leaving flight level_____ and climbing to flight level_____.
options.c: Request to start the step climb after passing the next waypoint.
options.d: Request to start a step climb to our 1g altitude at flight level _____.
